description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-contextual-help` (T3-06) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-contextual-help/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, trigger typed, popover placement typed, help content typed
2. Accessibility — trigger button has accessible label ("Help" or custom), popover has role=dialog, focus management, Escape closes, healthcare context: clear, plain-language help text required, axe-core pass
3. Tests — trigger open/close, keyboard interaction, content rendering, placement variants, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — with text content, with links, all placements
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, help icon styling, CSS parts (trigger, panel)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-contextual-help/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-contextual-help — T3-06 antagonistic quality review
